description: CompositionBlotched pink pleated round neck top made of 100% viscose, with short sleeves and foldover hems, and graphic print with stone embellishments on the frontFittingRegularWash careMachine or hand wash separatelyUse mild detergent onlyDo not bleach or wringUse mild detergent onlyDry in shadeMedium ironFlaunt your feminity in style with this pink top from jealous 21. The blotched pink along the entore top coupled with the graphic print of roses and stone embellishments adorning the entore front adds to it a complete touch of feminity. The short sleeves with foldover hems creates a fresh style statement. Team this cotton top with skinny jeans, shorts or skirts and stylish sandals from the wide range at myntra for that casual, feminine look.Model's statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-25"
